description: Learn the basic knife skills for safe and effective cooking.

steps.instruction: Hold the knife properly with a firm grip.
steps.tip: Use your dominant hand to hold the knife and your other hand to guide the food.

steps.instruction: Practice the claw grip with your non-dominant hand.
steps.tip: Keep your fingertips tucked in to avoid cuts.

steps.instruction: Learn to chop, slice, and dice various vegetables.
steps.tip: Start with soft vegetables like cucumbers before moving to harder ones like carrots.
